underlying_goal: Reorganize AI agent config files (.claude, .codex, skills) into a new folder, update symlinks, gitignore, and settings.json permissions
friction_detail: Bottom-link used relative path instead of absolute for out-of-workspace file; settings.json changes didn't apply to current session causing confusion about whether format was correct.
brief_summary: User wanted to reorganize agent config files into a new folder with updated symlinks and permissions; mostly achieved but hit issues with link paths and settings not applying until restart.
